TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sahle-Work Zewde ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 2, Sahle-Work Zewde, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1950) mrhuw Ethiopia ta' misuw hya' ga Sahle-Work Zewde, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2018 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Sahle-Work Zewde minkahul sa Addis Ababa na Ethiopia. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1950 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: s~…ēańßle-work zew*e rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, s~…ēańßle-work zew*e, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw etńßiopia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēańßle-work zew*e, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral s~…ēańßle-work zew*e minkańßul s~…ēa a**is~…ē aő≤aő≤a na etńßiopia. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Sahle-Work Zewde ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 2, Sahle-Work Zewde, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1950) mrhuw Ethiopia ta' misuw hya' ga Sahle-Work Zewde, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2018 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Sahle-Work Zewde minkahul sa Addis Ababa na Ethiopia. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1950 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw etńßiopia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēańßle-work zew*e, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral s~…ēańßle-work zew*e minkańßul s~…ēa a**is~…ē aő≤aő≤a na etńßiopia. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
